mapper.insert: INSERT INTO leave_request (student_id, leave_type, reason, start_time, end_time, proof_url, status) VALUES (#{studentId}, #{leaveType}, #{reason}, #{startTime}, #{endTime}, #{proofUrl}, #{status})
mapper.select: SELECT id, leave_type, reason, DATE_FORMAT(start_time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') AS start_time, DATE_FORMAT(end_time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') AS end_time, status, DATE_FORMAT(submitted_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') AS submitted_at FROM leave_request WHERE student_id = #{studentId} ORDER BY id DESC

SELECT lr.id, lr.student_id, su.real_name AS student_name, ci.class_name, counselor.real_name AS counselor_name, lr.leave_type, lr.reason, DATE_FORMAT(lr.start_time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') AS start_time, DATE_FORMAT(lr.end_time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') AS end_time, lr.proof_url, lr.status, DATE_FORMAT(lr.submitted_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') AS submitted_at FROM leave_request lr LEFT JOIN sys_user su ON su.id = lr.student_id LEFT JOIN student_profile sp ON sp.user_id = lr.student_id LEFT JOIN class_info ci ON ci.id = sp.class_id LEFT JOIN sys_user counselor ON counselor.id = ci.head_teacher_id WHERE lr.status = 'PENDING' ORDER BY lr.id DESC
SELECT DISTINCT co.teacher_id FROM course_schedule cs JOIN course_info co ON co.id = cs.course_id WHERE cs.class_id = #{classId} AND cs.week_day = DAYOFWEEK(#{leaveDate}) - 1
